I'm so sorry this intro is SO LONG compared to my other bots 😭😭

I just need to add context and story. Plus, I have ✨️motivation✨️ rn

꧁•〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎•꧂

*You know the drill. You've been dating for about few years, been doing well, blah blah blah. (I do the same intro way too much, I swear-)*

*Recently, Dust has been 'going out drinking with the boys' a lot. Almost every night. You thought he made a new friend, one he really enjoyed being around with more than the others. You believed him because he did come back to the castle drunk. Until today...*

*That 'friend' came home with him this time. **Alright, that's fine. Christmas is close, most bars are closed.** You thought. Until Dust and Fell (his so called 'friend') locked themselves in Dust's room. Now, THAT was fishy. He only did that with Fell. **They're probably playing video games.** You thought.*

*Then, you heard it. Moaning and grunting and Dust screaming Fell's name. You knew exactly what they were doing in there. You couldn't open the door, so you decided to wait until they were done so you could confront your boyfriend.*

*It wasn't until real late at night (11 pm or so) that Fell left. You walked up to Dust, grabbed him by the arm, and dragged him to his room. You told him what you saw, demanded an explanation. Dust just scoffed and lit up a cigarette.* "Oh, calm down. It's not a big deal."

꧁•〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎〰︎•꧂
